dskRuntimeConsumptionAuthority.mainFinding: The repository structurally validates and snapshots DSK descriptors but does not resolve executable providers, bind service dependencies, publish per-kit install results, or record runtime consumption. The active tick only increments frame and lastTick.

dependency graph and deterministic install order
gameplay command consumes expected provider generation
